subject: [CPS] Update with latest CPS image for Honululu
commit_message:
[CPS] Update with latest CPS image for Honululu

Added config for liquibase.
Updated image for CPS.

Issue-ID: CPS-256

Signed-off-by: Rishi.Chail <rishi.chail@est.tech>
Change-Id: I6c1dd27fc29e21efced95de874b7ce723536c438

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1421/ : FAILURE

Unreleased image detected. Only released images are allowed in oom helm charts. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1421/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-image-verify/1421

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm3.3/318

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/868/ : FAILURE

It seems that you don"t have a commit body.

You must add at least one sentence explaining the purpose of the commit ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/868/ )

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/868/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/868
